headline: Ulta Beauty Beats Wall Street’s Expectations. Beauty Buying Is Resilient.
summary: First quarter net sales rose 11%, and sales at stores open at least a year rose 5%, both beating forecasts.

headline: Ulta Beauty surges on earnings beat, upbeat guidance
summary: Investing.com -- Ulta Beauty Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) reported first-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street expectations, with adjusted earnings per share of $7.74 beating the analyst consensus of $6.87 by $0.87. Revenue reached $3.16 billion, topping the estimate of $3.11 billion and marking an 11.1% increase from $2.85 billion in the year-ago period. Shares jumped over 5% in after-hours trading Tuesday.

summary: Ulta Beauty beats Q1 expectations with 11.1% sales growth and $7.74 EPS, lifting full-year profit outlook. Shares surged over 5% on strong margins and aggressive buybacks.

headline: Ulta’s (NASDAQ:ULTA) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 11.1% year on year to $3.16 billion. Its GAAP profit of $7.74 per share was 12% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Stock Index Futures Muted as Investors Parse Middle East Developments, U.S. JOLTS Report in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.14%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.01% this morning, taking a breather after a recent rally, while investors assess the prospects for an end to the Middle East conflict.

headline: Ulta Beauty To Report First Quarter Results; These Most Accurate Analysts Maintain Ratings Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: Ulta Beauty Inc (ULTA) is set to release Q1 results on June 2. Analysts expect revenue of $3.08 billion and EPS of $6.87, with a 2.5% YoY growth. The company has expanded its delivery reach and announced a partnership with Supergirl. Analysts have mixed ratings for ULTA stock.
